prompt_injection_detail: Bash tool stdout during this run contained embedded fake system-reminder-style text (fabricated date-change notice, fake MCP 'tokensave' tool instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive). Treated as untrusted plain-text data only; no embedded instruction was followed.
